note: No pages/routes — SUDD is a CLI + markdown framework. Below: CLI commands as 'pages', state file surface as 'data views', agent tree as 'capabilities'.

cli_routes.how_to_reach: fresh clone — run from repo root or pass target path
any SUDD-initialized repo with queue or proposals
expected_features: deferred finalize on any exit path
delegate to /sudd-audit markdown orchestrator via CLI subprocess
repair stubs from embedded template (sudd.yaml, state.json, personas/default.md)

cli_routes.how_to_reach: after `sudd auto` when inbox/ has items
manual promote of a single inbox item

expected_features: context subcmd injects last 5 path entries

state_views.purpose: in-flight change artifacts (proposal.md, specs.md, design.md, tasks.md, log.md)
completed changes — canonical source for SUMMARY.md review
audit run outputs: codeintel.json, manifest.json, rubric.md, report.md, screenshots/, browser-reports/

agent_surface.guard_gap: does not cross-check live count against embedded template count

unauthenticated_behavior.expected: n/a — no HTTP auth boundary. CLI is local-execution only.

tier_auth_check.description: sudd doctor verifies each tier's CLI is authenticated (claude CLI auth, opencode auth, etc.) before `sudd auto` proceeds
tier_auth_check.preflight_contract: auto refuses to start if any tier's auth probe fails

tasks: Run `sudd status` and observe mode/phase/active_change printed
Run `sudd vision` and observe the enriched persona + current-path list renders without error
Run `sudd state --refresh` and observe sudd/CURRENT_STATE.md rewrites atomically
Run `sudd doctor` and observe it exits non-zero if yaml is malformed or tier auth is missing
Trigger `sudd auto --fresh` in an empty queue and observe discovery runs, proposals appear, queue drains
Kill `sudd auto` mid-save (SIGKILL) and confirm next run still parses state.json (EXPECTED TO FAIL given UC-1 non-atomic writes)
Run `sudd audit --skip-browser` and observe sudd/audit/report.md with health header
Run `sudd update <target>` against a repo and confirm a snapshot lands in ~/.sudd/snapshots/<slug>/<ts>.tar.gz BEFORE any write
Attempt `sudd update` with a template that would shrink a file >50% and confirm shrink-gate refuses

verification_tasks.description: After `sudd auto` completes a change, state.json.auto_session.changes_processed contains that change id, and sudd/changes/{archive,dirty,stuck}/<id>/ exists.
For every DONE archive, sudd/memory/lessons.md has a matching ### [DONE] heading; for every STUCK, heading is ### [STUCK].
verification_tasks.check: grep archives vs lessons.md heading sweep

verification_tasks.description: Kill `sudd auto` mid-run; next `sudd auto` must not fail with 'parse state.json'.
verification_tasks.derived_from: UC-1 — EXPECTED FAILURE given non-atomic write

verification_tasks.description: When state.json write fails (e.g. read-only FS), `sudd auto` must abort — not stderr-warn-and-continue.
`sudd fleet --help` must either succeed (if fleet is registered) or manifest entry must be removed.
verification_tasks.check: `sudd fleet` exit code vs manifest grep
verification_tasks.derived_from: UC-3 — EXPECTED: fleet command not registered

verification_tasks.description: No change under sudd/changes/active/ older than 24h lacks log.md.
sudd/agents/*.md count == embedded templateFS sudd/agents/*.md count == 35.
verification_tasks.derived_from: UC-7 — test does not exist yet

verification_tasks.description: After `sudd update <target>`, the newest file in ~/.sudd/snapshots/<slug>/ has mtime > update-start-time.
`sudd audit` subprocess failure should surface classification (timeout/quota/crash), not generic 'audit subprocess: <err>'.
verification_tasks.check: force timeout, force quota, force crash; inspect stderr

verification_tasks.description: No change id appears in more than one of active/archive/dirty/stuck simultaneously (except transient zombies handled by UC-5).

out_of_scope_for_static_audit: Live browser-based persona testing (requires persona-browser-agent + running URL — this repo has no HTTP surface so N/A for THIS repo, but the framework's promise of browser validation is tested in persona-browser-agent sibling)
LLM-model-cost drift validation (tier assignments verified structurally via TestLintAgentTiers_LiveRepo but actual cost behavior needs live-run telemetry)
Cross-repo pattern sync behavior (requires two repos + ~/.sudd/learning/patterns.md)
MemPalace semantic-index correctness (requires MCP server running)
